inputs.label: Tank Volume
inputs.businessContext: The volume of the scuba cylinder in liters.

businessContext_i18n.en: The volume of the scuba cylinder in liters.

inputs.label: Starting Pressure
inputs.businessContext: The pressure of the full tank.

businessContext_i18n.en: The pressure of the full tank.

inputs.label: Reserve Pressure
inputs.businessContext: The pressure at which the dive should be ended, typically for safety reserve.

businessContext_i18n.en: The pressure at which the dive should be ended, typically for safety reserve.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dalgıcın dalışı sonlandırması gereken basınç, genellikle güvenlik rezervi için.

inputs.label: Average Dive Depth
inputs.businessContext: The planned average depth of the dive.

businessContext_i18n.en: The planned average depth of the dive.

inputs.label: Surface Air Consumption
inputs.businessContext: The diver's personal surface air consumption rate.

businessContext_i18n.en: The diver's personal surface air consumption rate.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dalgıcın kişisel yüzey hava tüketim hızı.

inputs.label: Water Density Factor
inputs.businessContext: 1.00 for freshwater, 1.03 for saltwater; reflects pressure increase per 10m depth.

businessContext_i18n.en: 1.00 for freshwater, 1.03 for saltwater; reflects pressure increase per 10m depth.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tatlı su için 1.00, tuzlu su için 1.03; 10m derinlik başına basınç artışını yansıtır.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
